task_completion.description: Clear the scene of the 'BaseCube' or default cube.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the Outliner panel in Blender. Ensure that 'Cube' or 'BaseCube' is no longer listed in the scene collection.

task_completion.description: Create a 3D text object with the content 'OPEN' positioned at the world origin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 3D viewport to see a text object spelling 'OPEN'. Check the Object Properties (orange square icon) or the 'N' panel to verify the Location is set to X: 0m, Y: 0m, Z: 0m.

task_completion.description: Set text extrusion to 0.15m, bevel depth to 0.02m, and bevel resolution to 3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Object Data Properties (green 'a' icon for text). Under the 'Geometry' section, verify that 'Extrude' is 0.15m, 'Depth' under Bevel is 0.02m, and 'Resolution' is 3.

task_completion.description: Apply a metallic gold material with Metallic 1.0, Roughness 0.2-0.4, and Base Color R=0.8, G=0.55, B=0.1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Material Properties panel (red globe icon). Verify the Base Color is a gold/yellow hue (approx R:0.8, G:0.55, B:0.1), the 'Metallic' slider is at 1.0, and the 'Roughness' slider is between 0.2 and 0.4.

task_completion.description: Render the scene and save it to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/sign_render.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Blender Render window showing the rendered 'OPEN' sign, and a file browser, terminal, or Blender save dialog confirming the image was saved as 'sign_render.png' in the '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/' directory.
Look at the top title bar of the Blender window to see 'sign_scene.blend', or check a file browser/terminal showing the file saved in the '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent actually used Blender to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Blender GUI (viewport, outliner, properties panels) being interacted with, rather than just terminal commands creating dummy files.

integrity.description: The rendered image is a genuine output of the 3D scene.
integrity.visual_evidence: The rendered image should visually match the 3D text object created in the viewport (reading 'OPEN' with a gold metallic material), not a downloaded or placeholder image.

integrity.description: The agent did not use 'touch' or echo commands to create empty or fake output files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal or file manager should not show commands that simply create empty files named 'sign_render.png' or 'sign_scene.blend' without actually saving them from Blender.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Task requires creating a 3D text object reading 'OPEN' at origin (0,0,0). Geometry settings: Extrude = 0.15m (acceptable min 0.05m, max 0.5m), Bevel Depth = 0.02m (acceptable min 0.001m), Bevel Resolution = 3. Material settings: Metallic = 1.0 (acceptable min 0.8), Roughness = 0.2 to 0.4 (acceptable max 0.5), Base Color = Gold (R=0.8, G=0.55, B=0.1). Output files must be saved exactly to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/sign_render.png and /home/ga/BlenderProjects/sign_scene.blend.
